results.text: China's May shipments to the U.S. surge 35% to 5-year high as overall exports defy Iran war drag. Exports to the U.S. surged the most since March 2021, extending a rebound following a long streak of double-digit declines for the most of last year.
results.label: positive

results.text: Trump booed before Knicks lose to Spurs at Madison Square Garden in NBA Finals Game 3. Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.
